title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 324.402 - State and local governments prohibited from requiring use of registered interior designers
text:
324.402.  State and local governments prohibited from requiring use of registered interior designers. — The state or any county, municipality, or other political subdivision shall not require the use of a registered interior designer for any residential building, residential remodeling, residential rehabilitation, or residential construction purposes.
(L. 2004 S.B. 1122)
